tasks.label: Commit ProjectionOptions port
tasks.command: rm ../tests_opossum/Opossum.UnitTests/Projections/ProjectionOptionsTests.cs ../tests_opossum/Opossum.UnitTests/Projections/ProjectionOptionsValidationTests.cs && git add src/projections/options.rs src/projections.rs ../tests_opossum/Opossum.UnitTests/Projections/ && git commit -m "chore: Port C# ProjectionOptions tests to rust inline module"

tasks.label: Commit ProjectionOptions port
tasks.command: rm -f tests_opossum/Opossum.UnitTests/Projections/ProjectionOptionsTests.cs tests_opossum/Opossum.UnitTests/Projections/ProjectionOptionsValidationTests.cs && git add src/projections/options.rs src/projections.rs tests_opossum/Opossum.UnitTests/Projections/ProjectionOptions* && git commit -m "chore: Port C# ProjectionOptions tests to rust inline module"

tasks.label: Commit ProjectionOptions fixes
tasks.command: rm -f tests_opossum/Opossum.UnitTests/Projections/ProjectionOptionsTests.cs tests_opossum/Opossum.UnitTests/Projections/ProjectionOptionsValidationTests.cs && git add src/projections/options.rs src/projections.rs && git add -u tests_opossum/Opossum.UnitTests/Projections && git commit -m "chore: Port C# ProjectionOptions tests to rust inline module"

tasks.label: commit
tasks.command: rm tests_opossum/Opossum.UnitTests/Extensions/EventStoreExtensionsTests.cs && git add . && git commit -m "feat: Port EventStoreExtensions to Rust with unit tests"

tasks.label: cleanup
tasks.command: git rm -f add_tests.py errors.txt errs2.txt fix2.py fix_extensions.py update_extensions.py && git commit --amend --no-edit
